allow: PowerShell($env:PORT="3737"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "src/index.js" -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput "smoke.out" -RedirectStandardError "smoke.err"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3737/health" -TimeoutSec 5; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { "REQ_ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force; Get-Content smoke.out; if \(Test-Path smoke.err\) { "---STDERR---"; Get-Content smoke.err }; Remove-Item smoke.out, smoke.err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
